products.description:
ENGLAND soccer jersey with Climacool+ technology for a cool and focused performance.

The ARGENTINA AWAY KIT 2026 unites soccer heritage with forward-thinking design. Crafted in knit jacquard with a slim, performance fit, it’s built to move with precision. Climacool+ materials wick and manage sweat quickly, helping you stay cool, dry, and comfortable.
products.fabricDetails:
• Premium Imported Player Edition
• Main Material: 100% Polyester (100% Recycled)
• CLIMACOOL+ technology
• Sweat-wicking & Quick drying
